title: Hazelnut Fried Crisps
description: Crisp Spanish hazelnut fried snacks are easy to make at home with this simple recipe.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. Chop the hazelnuts into smaller pieces and set aside.
3. Remove the crisps from the bag and separate them.
4. Fry the crisps in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Remove the fried crisps from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
6. Sprinkle the crisps with salt and hazelnuts.
7. If desired, sprinkle with sugar for a sweet snack.
8. Serve the crispy hazelnut snacks immediately and enjoy!
